---
title: "UIAO Application Identity Schema (UIAO_129)"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · application-identity.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/application-identity/application-identity.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/application-identity/application-identity.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/application-identity/application-identity.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for ApplicationIdentity records consumed by uiao.governance.application_identity. Per UIAO_129 §2, every application identity carries six required bindings — dns, address, iam, trust, segmentation, location — with exactly one authority each. The schema enforces presence; runtime drift detection enforces correctness against the authority registries.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `id` | string | ✓ | Stable application identity URN. Format 'app:<slug>'. Slug is kebab-case, 2-64 chars, no leading/trailing hyphens. Once allocated this id is immutable for the application's lifetime — retirement deallocates the id but it MUST NOT be re-issued. |
| `name` | string | ✓ | Human-readable application name. Authoritative for documentation; runtime decisions use 'id'. |
| `tenant_id` | string | ✓ | Tenant id from src/uiao/canon/tenants.yaml (UIAO_112). Application identities are tenant-scoped; cross-tenant references are DRIFT-AUTHZ findings. |
| `lifecycle_state` | enum: 'proposed', 'provisioned', 'active', 'quarantined', 'retired' | ✓ | UIAO_129 §4 lifecycle state. Transitions are constrained — see ApplicationIdentity.transition_to in the runtime. |
| `bindings` | object | ✓ | All six bindings required per UIAO_129 §2. Missing binding emits DRIFT-SCHEMA at P2. |
| `created_at` | string |  | ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of initial canon allocation. Immutable. |
| `updated_at` | string |  | ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent canon edit (any field). Refreshed on every commit. |
| `transition_history` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/transition`&gt; |  | Append-only log of lifecycle transitions. Each entry is a signed event in the evidence graph (UIAO_113); this canon copy is the readability surface, the evidence graph is the authority. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="application-identity.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/application-identity/application-identity.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO Application Identity Schema (UIAO_129)",
  "description": "JSON Schema for ApplicationIdentity records consumed by uiao.governance.application_identity. Per UIAO_129 \u00a72, every application identity carries six required bindings \u2014 dns, address, iam, trust, segmentation, location \u2014 with exactly one authority each. The schema enforces presence; runtime drift detection enforces correctness against the authority registries.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "id",
    "name",
    "tenant_id",
    "lifecycle_state",
    "bindings"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "id": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^app:[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,62}[a-z0-9]$",
      "description": "Stable application identity URN. Format 'app:<slug>'. Slug is kebab-case, 2-64 chars, no leading/trailing hyphens. Once allocated this id is immutable for the application's lifetime \u2014 retirement deallocates the id but it MUST NOT be re-issued."
    },
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "description": "Human-readable application name. Authoritative for documentation; runtime decisions use 'id'."
    },
    "tenant_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "description": "Tenant id from src/uiao/canon/tenants.yaml (UIAO_112). Application identities are tenant-scoped; cross-tenant references are DRIFT-AUTHZ findings."
    },
    "lifecycle_state": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "proposed",
        "provisioned",
        "active",
        "quarantined",
        "retired"
      ],
      "description": "UIAO_129 \u00a74 lifecycle state. Transitions are constrained \u2014 see ApplicationIdentity.transition_to in the runtime."
    },
    "bindings": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "dns",
        "address",
        "iam",
        "trust",
        "segmentation",
        "location"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "dns": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        },
        "address": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        },
        "iam": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        },
        "trust": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        },
        "segmentation": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        },
        "location": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/binding"
        }
      },
      "description": "All six bindings required per UIAO_129 \u00a72. Missing binding emits DRIFT-SCHEMA at P2."
    },
    "created_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of initial canon allocation. Immutable."
    },
    "updated_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent canon edit (any field). Refreshed on every commit."
    },
    "transition_history": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/transition"
      },
      "description": "Append-only log of lifecycle transitions. Each entry is a signed event in the evidence graph (UIAO_113); this canon copy is the readability surface, the evidence graph is the authority."
    }
  },
  "$defs": {
    "binding": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "authority_adapter",
        "value"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "authority_adapter": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "description": "Adapter id from src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml or modernization-registry.yaml that owns this binding. The binding's value is sourced from this adapter and only this adapter; cross-authority overrides are DRIFT-SEMANTIC findings."
        },
        "value": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "description": "Binding value as understood by the authority adapter. Format depends on the binding kind: dns is FQDN; address is CIDR or VPC/VNet ARN; iam is workload-identity URI (SPIFFE / managed-identity ARN / service-principal id); trust is cert thumbprint or token-issuer URL; segmentation is policy-engine label; location is region/cloud/zone identifier."
        },
        "verified_at": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Last time the binding was reconciled against the authority adapter's live state. Stale verified_at (> freshness-window-hours per the adapter's registry entry) emits DRIFT-PROVENANCE."
        }
      }
    },
    "transition": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "from_state",
        "to_state",
        "at"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "from_state": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "proposed",
            "provisioned",
            "active",
            "quarantined",
            "retired"
          ]
        },
        "to_state": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "proposed",
            "provisioned",
            "active",
            "quarantined",
            "retired"
          ]
        },
        "at": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the transition."
        },
        "reason": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Human-readable transition cause. Quarantine transitions MUST cite a drift_finding_id."
        },
        "drift_finding_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Drift engine finding id; required when to_state is 'quarantined'."
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
